# Support & Contact

## Overview

MarketForge operates as an extension of your team.

Our goal is to support you in executing the right actions, understanding performance, and ensuring the system works effectively for your business.

---

## How We Support You

We provide support for:

* action strategy and recommendations
* execution guidance
* platform-related questions
* performance interpretation
* general product usage

---

## Action Execution Timing

Once an action is approved, MarketForge begins execution within **24 hours**.

If additional information, access, or platform approvals are required, timing may vary slightly. Any delays will be communicated clearly.

---

## When to Reach Out

You should contact us if:

* you have questions about an action
* you need help with execution
* something does not look right
* you want guidance on next steps
* you are unsure how to proceed

---

## Contact

📧 [marketforgelabs@gmail.com](mailto:marketforgelabs@gmail.com)

All messages are monitored and responded to as quickly as possible.

---

## Summary

If you need anything, reach out.

We are here to help ensure your business gets the most value from MarketForge.
